title: castilleja purpurea var. citrina
intro: Castilleja purpurea var. citrina, also known as the citrine or yellow-pink Indian paintbrush, is a variety of the Castilleja purpurea plant, a type of flowering plant in the figwort family. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Castilleja purpurea var. citrina include its potential to treat various health issues such as fever, sore throats, and respiratory problems. The plant can be used to prepare herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
